identity.verified_body: Your identity has been verified. The ID Verified badge is now visible on your profile.
identity.failed_body: We were unable to verify your identity.
identity.failed_hint: Please ensure your photo ID is clear, well-lit, and that your name and date of birth match your profile.
identity.dob_body: We need your date of birth to verify it matches your government-issued ID.
identity.fee_body: Identity verification costs {{fee}}. This is a one-time fee — you won't be charged again if you need to retry.
identity.in_progress_body: Please complete the verification in the opened window. This page will update automatically.
identity.start_body: Submit your government-issued ID and a selfie to earn the ID Verified badge.
identity.error_save_dob: Failed to save date of birth. Please try again.
identity.error_create_payment: Failed to create payment. Please try again.

identity_verified_lock_dob: Your date of birth is locked because your identity has been verified.
marketing_consent_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to receive occasional marketing emails, product updates, and community highlights? You can unsubscribe at any time.
title: Settings
select_language: Choose your preferred language for the interface
twofa_what_is_desc: An authenticator app generates a temporary 6-digit code that changes every 30 seconds. It adds an extra layer of security — even if someone knows your password, they can't log in without the code from your phone.
twofa_download_prompt: Download a free authenticator app if you don't have one:
twofa_scan_qr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
twofa_code_description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twofa_disable_warning: This will reduce your account security
twofa_disable_desc: Without 2FA, your account will only be protected by your password.
backup_codes_warning: Save these codes in a safe place
backup_codes_desc: Each backup code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use these codes to sign in.

biometric.platform_windows_step1: Click "This PC" to create a passkey stored on this computer. You'll confirm with your Windows Hello PIN, fingerprint, or face.
biometric.platform_windows_step2: Requirement: You must have Windows Hello set up first. Go to Windows Settings > Accounts > Sign-in options > PIN to set it up.
biometric.platform_windows_step3: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to scan a QR code with your phone instead.
biometric.platform_windows_step4: To set up passkeys on your phone too, open this page on your phone and tap "This device".
biometric.platform_mac_step1: Click "This Mac" — your browser will prompt Touch ID or your Mac password.
biometric.platform_mac_step2: The passkey syncs via iCloud Keychain to your iPhone, iPad, and other Macs automatically.
biometric.platform_mac_step3: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a different device.
biometric.platform_iphone_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using Face ID or Touch ID.
biometric.platform_iphone_step2: The passkey is saved to iCloud Keychain and works on all your Apple devices.
biometric.platform_iphone_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
biometric.platform_ipad_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using Face ID or Touch ID.
biometric.platform_ipad_step2: The passkey is saved to iCloud Keychain and works on all your Apple devices.
biometric.platform_ipad_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
biometric.platform_android_step1: Tap "This device" to create a passkey using your fingerprint, face, or screen lock.
biometric.platform_android_step2: The passkey is saved to Google Password Manager and works on all your Android devices and Chrome browsers.
biometric.platform_android_step3: You can also tap "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a security key.
biometric.platform_linux_step1: Click "This device" — your browser will use its built-in passkey manager.
biometric.platform_linux_step2: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to use a USB security key or scan a QR code with your phone.
biometric.platform_unknown_step1: Click "This device" to create a passkey on the device you're using now.
biometric.platform_unknown_step2: Or click "Phone, tablet, or security key" to register a different device.

passkey_multi_device_note: You can register passkeys on multiple devices. Each device needs its own passkey unless your passkey provider syncs them (e.g., iCloud Keychain syncs across Apple devices, Google Password Manager syncs across Android and Chrome).
passkey_device_tip: Register a passkey on each device you use. To add your phone, open this page on your phone.
passkey_confirm_remove_all_body: Are you sure you want to remove all passkeys? You'll need to set them up again on each device.

profile.identity_verified_lock: Your name is locked because your identity has been verified.
profile.phone_invalid: Phone must be in international E.164 format (e.g. +1 555 123 4567)

insurance.title: Insurance Certificates
insurance.description: Upload your insurance certificates for verification. Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG (max 10MB).

notification_descriptions.achievement_milestones: Badge unlocks, level ups, and achievement notifications
notification_descriptions.weekly_digest: A weekly summary of community activity
notification_descriptions.membership_updates: Member joins, leaves, and membership changes
notification_descriptions.mutual_match_alerts: Get notified when someone you matched with also matches you
notification_descriptions.enable_push: Receive real-time notifications on your device
notification_descriptions.marketing_emails: Receive newsletters, promotions, and community updates

federation.title: Federation Settings
federation.description: Manage your visibility and preferences across partner communities

gdpr.title: Data & Privacy Rights
gdpr.description: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, export, and request deletion of your personal data. These requests are processed within 30 days.
gdpr.info: All six GDPR data subject rights are available above. Contact our Data Protection Officer for any additional concerns.
gdpr.download_desc: Get a copy of all your personal data
gdpr.portability_desc: Export data in a machine-readable format
gdpr.deletion_desc: Request permanent deletion of your data
gdpr.rectification_desc: Request correction of inaccurate personal data
gdpr.restriction_desc: Request restriction of your data processing
gdpr.objection_desc: Object to processing of your personal data
gdpr.deletion_modal_desc: Once your data is deleted, it cannot be recovered. Your account and all associated data will be permanently removed.
gdpr.download_modal_desc: We will prepare a downloadable archive of all your personal data, including your profile, listings, messages, and transaction history. You will receive an email with a download link within 30 days.
gdpr.portability_modal_desc: We will export your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format (JSON/CSV). This allows you to transfer your data to another service. You will receive an email within 30 days.
gdpr.rectification_modal_desc: Request correction of any inaccurate or incomplete personal data we hold about you. We will review your request and update the records within 30 days.
gdpr.restriction_modal_desc: Request that we restrict the processing of your personal data. While restricted, we will store but not actively process your data. We will respond within 30 days.
gdpr.objection_modal_desc: Object to the processing of your personal data for specific purposes, such as direct marketing or profiling. We will review your objection within 30 days.
gdpr.confirmation_email: A confirmation email will be sent to your registered email address.

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.description: Add skills to your profile so other members can find you. Community members can endorse your skills.

logout_modal.title: Log Out
logout_modal.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?

delete_modal.title: Delete Account
delete_modal.warning: Warning: This action cannot be undone
delete_modal.warning_desc: All your data, including listings, messages, and transaction history will be permanently deleted.
delete_modal.aria_label: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion

blocked_users.subtitle: Manage users you have blocked
blocked_users.empty_desc: Users you block won't be able to see your profile, message you, or interact with your content.
blocked_users.unblock_confirm_body: They will be able to see your profile and send you messages again. You will not be reconnected automatically.

block_user.title: Block {{name}}?
block_user.body: They won't be able to see your profile, message you, or interact with your content. Any existing connection will be removed.
